titleStmt.title: SII 35.13: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 13. (A.R. No. 49 of 1950-51.) BAICHAVAḶḶI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone set up near the Basavaṇṇa temple.
This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 969, Sarvajit, Bhādrapada Amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse corresponding to A.D. 1047, September 21, Monday.

It states that the bund of a tank at Baisavaḷḷi which had given way was repaired and an endowment of wet land made for its upkeep. At that time Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāvuṇḍarāya was governing Banavāsi-12000, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mayūravarman of the Kadamba family was holding the fief (manneya sāmya) of Pānuṁgal-500 included in the area and Eṛagāri held the office of Ūrgavuṇḍu of Baisavaḷḷi. Chāvuṇḍarāya's younger brother Barmmadēva also made a gift of siddhāya for the same purpose. Sēnabōva Dāsimayya of Niṭṭasiṁgi wrote the record and Barmōja engraved it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmānandhāsuradhvaṁsī śrīṣṭiyudbhavakārakā pāyātkadaṁbavaṁśābja lakṣmīṣīṁkṣārakṣaṇakṣamaḥ ©
svasti śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēva vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamāna mā
caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādārādhakaṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍa
ḷēśvara mahālakṣmīlabdhavaraprasāda nāyakācā¨ryanasahāyasau¨rya nāmādi samasta pra
śastisahita śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāvuṇḍarāyarasa¨rbbanavāsipanni¨rccāsiramumanāḷu
ttamire . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara banavāsipuravarēśvaratraikṣa
kṣmā saṁbhavaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭitalalāṭalōcana catu¨rbbhujajagadviditāṣṭādaśāśvamēdhā
dīkṣitakuḷaprasūta nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara mayū
rava¨rmadēvaru banavāsipanniccāsirada pānuṁgalaiynūṟada manneyaṁ sāmyadiṁ duṣṭanigraha si
ṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . mahadēvapādārādhakaṁ neṟagāri baisavaḷḷiya
nū¨rggāvuṇḍugeyye . sakava¨rṣa 969 neya sa¨rvajitsaṁvatsarada bhādrapadamavāsyeyuṁ sōma
vāramuṁ sū¨ryyagrahaṇadaṁdu baisavaḷḷiya Elaṁciyanā¨rkkaṭṭoḍedi¨rddaḍe kāsigarakoḷḷu
kaṭṭi tanna māḍidā dha¨rmakke Eṟagārigāvuṇḍaṁge ponnaṁ koṭṭāvakālakka paḍi salisuva
Ūriṁ baḍaga dēvarakeyyiṁ teṁka nereyāge biṭṭa gaḻdeya mattarondu śrīmanmayūra
va¨rmadēvanuṁ nāḍuṁ parigrahamumaṟiya biṭṭa datti mēlācāvuṇḍarāyarasara
tamma ba¨rmadēvarasa siddhāyamaṁ biṭṭaraṁtāvakāla¨rkketra bhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhi sa¨rvabādhāparihāra mā
gi biṭṭa dha¨rmaviṁtī dha¨rmamaṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷpuṇyadi nāḍoḷsasira
kavileya sāsi¨rvvavēdapāragarappa(sa) brāhmaṇa¨rggubhayamukhigoṭṭa palaviṁtī dha¨rmmamanaḷi
dātarige vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷsasira kavileyaṁ sāsi¨rvva brāhmaṇarumanaḷida pā
takanakku . svadatta paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdarā ṣaṣṭi¨rvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yā jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmasētu nripāṇaṁ kālē kālē pālaniyōdbhavadbhiḥ
sa¨rvvānētāṁ bhāgināṁḻpā¨rtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra . Eṟagāri
gāvuṇḍana maga kāḷagāvuṇḍaṁ paḍi salisuva . śāsanava baredaṁ niṭṭasiṁgiya sēna
bōvaṁ dāsimayya . besageydaṁ ba¨rmmōja maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . ©
Digital edition of SII 35.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
